image_prompts:
Episode: 4
Scene: 01 — มือที่คว้าคอเสื้อ

Visual style: stylized hand-blown glass figurine Thai melodrama characters matching the Stage 2 character sheets: translucent glossy glass bodies, smooth reflective surfaces, visible glass thickness, soft internal glow, delicate colored-glass details, rounded toy-like proportions, simplified expressive glass-doll faces; high-end anime painted background environments, vertical 9:16, no realistic human skin
Attached image order for this scene: @img1 = Adult Thao, @img2 = Khun Thongdaeng
Characters visible in this shot only: @img1 (Adult Thao), @img2 (Khun Thongdaeng)
English scene description: ภาพ close-up มุมเสยเห็นมือแก้วของเทาตอนโตคว้าคอเสื้อขุนทองแดงแน่น เห็นครึ่งตัวและฉาก nursery ด้านหลังพร่า ๆ เปิดตอนด้วยความโกรธทันที. Thai melodrama fantasy scene with emotionally readable acting, clear blocking, and continuity with the previous scene.
Dialogue context / intended Thai spoken emotion: เทาตอนโต: “พูดมา! ลูกข้าอยู่ไหน!”
Prompt:
Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic image for a Thai melodrama fantasy short drama. Start directly with an intense stable close-up: Adult Thao’s translucent glass hand clamps onto Khun Thongdaeng’s collar, both half-bodies framed from a low angle with tense partial faces and the nursery background blurred behind them. The close-up should immediately raise the question of what Khun Thongdaeng has hidden. No wide establishing shot, no zoom-in, no push-in. All visible characters are stylized hand-blown glass figurines matching the attached character sheets, with translucent glossy glass bodies, visible glass thickness, reflective surfaces, simplified expressive glass-doll faces, delicate internal glow, and no realistic human skin. Use high-end hand-painted 2D anime background art with soft painterly gradients, luminous cinematic light, atmospheric depth, detailed props from the scene, rich natural colors, and polished feature-film anime background finish. Compose the shot so the emotional conflict is instantly readable. Keep only the listed characters visible in frame. Maintain prop continuity and character color identity from the reference sheets.
Negative prompt:
no text overlay, no subtitles, no watermark, no logo, no real human, no live-action actor, no realistic human skin, no pores, no flesh, no photoreal person, no Thai drama actor

video_prompts:
# Scene 01 — The Canyon That Swallows the Poor

Episode: EP02 — The Golden Bridge and the Trembling Book

## Veo3.1 Prompt

Create a vertical 9:16 video, approximately 6-8s. Visual style: realistic/semi-photoreal Thai drama characters, high-end anime painted background environments: hand-painted 2D anime environment art with clean linework, soft painterly gradients, luminous cinematic light, atmospheric depth, detailed Thai-period locations and props, gentle haze, rich but natural colors, polished feature-film anime background finish; not a generic flat cartoon and not a 3D environment, cinematic emotional staging. Khram color continuity: Khram must appear in warm burnt-orange / amber-orange glass and outfit, clearly not blue or cyan.

Scene action: A massive canyon opens ahead. A broken road ends at the cliff edge while dust and wind swallow the view below.

Camera movement: begin with an establishing or medium shot that clearly shows the danger and social power imbalance, then slowly push in toward the most emotional face. Use one continuous dramatic camera move with no jumpy cuts.

Actor blocking and emotion: the characters move and react according to the scene action. Keep body language theatrical but believable: trembling hands, sharp pointing gestures, protective blocking, guilty glances, and tearful hesitation when appropriate.

Spoken dialogue in Thai, delivered with intense Thai-lakorn-style melodrama:
- นิล: “ช่องผานั่นกว้างเกินไป... ไม่มีใครข้ามได้หรอก”
- ขุนทองแดง: “คนจนคงข้ามไม่ได้กระมัง”
- ขุนเพลิง: “ผากว้างเพียงใด ก็ไม่ได้ทำให้หัวใจเจ้ากว้างขึ้นเลย”

Sound: natural diegetic ambience only: water, wind, wood creaks, magical shimmer when relevant, breathing, footsteps, cloth movement, and emotional voice performance. No background music, no soundtrack, no BGM, no subtitles, no on-screen text, no watermark, no logo.

# Scene 02 — Money Commands the Road

Episode: EP02 — The Golden Bridge and the Trembling Book

## Veo3.1 Prompt

Create a vertical 9:16 video, approximately 6-8s.
